productDisplayName: Rockport Men Ed Plaintoe Brown Formal Shoes
description: Slip into laidback comfort with these Plaintoe shoes. Coming from rockport's signature series, these shoes feature a no-nonsense upper crafted from rich leather with stitch detailing for extra style. Engineered with adidas AdiPRENE technology, this shoe offers all-day cushioning comfort making it a great buy. Upper Full-grain leather upper for added strength and durability Padded tongue and collar to protect from excessive rubbing and prevent blistering Lace-ups for a snug Fit Brand name engraved on the tongue Midsole Highly shock-absorbent adiPRENE technology infused cushioning protects the heel on impact for all day cushioned comfort Polyurethane (PU) Midsole Offers durability for long-term wear & shock absorbent-cushioning to help reduce foot fatigue Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole delivers shock absorption thereby reducing foot fatigue Flex grooves provide flexibility in foot movement Textures on the outsole enhances grip on various surfaces Shoe care Use a leather brush to dust off the dirt Use a leather shoe polish to make the shoes shine Do not store in direct sunlight
